flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at DeSales University rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 ($22.0k → $27.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at DeSales University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($41.0k → $46.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at DeSales University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
